description: Questo sub-concetto distingue tra rumori improvvisi e percussivi (impattanti) e rumori che creano una risonanza prolungata.
positive: The sudden clap echoed sharply, a brief jolt against my ribs – *un colpo secco e immediato*.
A dropped tool struck the floor with a distinct *klack*, vibrating briefly in my foot.
The impact of the ball against my forearm was instantaneous and localized – *un impatto preciso*.
A sharp *bang* resonated only briefly, a transient pressure on my eardrum.
The brief thud against my shoulder was a quick, defined sensation – *un percossione fugace*.
The hammering on the metal produced a sharp, distinct *don*, felt through my hand.
A quick slap on the back felt like a precise, immediate pressure – *un colpo isolato*.
The brief *plop* of the object hitting the water was a sudden, localized shock.
A short, sharp knock resonated briefly, a transient vibration in my chest – *un colpo rapido*.
The sudden *crack* felt like a quick pulse against my temple.
The immediate *thump* against my leg was a brief, defined sensation - *un colpo netto*.
A brief, sharp *tock* felt like a quick pressure against my ear – *un colpo isolato*.
The quick *bump* against my shin was a distinct, immediate impact – *un impatto fugace*.
A sudden *smack* against my palm felt like a brief, localized vibration – *un colpo preciso*.
The short, sharp *tap* resonated briefly, a transient pressure on my jaw – *un colpo rapido*.
The immediate *clunk* felt like a quick pulse against my thigh - *un impatto secco*.
A brief *strike* against my arm was a distinct, localized sensation - *una percossione*.
The sudden *knock* resonated briefly, a transient vibration in my head – *un colpo isolato*.
A sharp *rap* felt like a quick pressure against my neck – *un impatto fugace*.
The brief *pound* resonated briefly, a transient vibration in my shoulder - *un colpo netto*.
negative: The deep hum of the machine lingered, a prolonged vibration in my bones – *una risonanza continua*.
The low rumble seemed to permeate my chest, a sustained, subtle feeling – *una vibrazione prolungata*.
A prolonged drone vibrated through my body, creating a lingering sensation – *una risonanza profonda*.
The sustained vibration resonated in my ribcage, a slow, pervasive feeling – *una vibrazione continua*.
A deep, drawn-out resonance filled my head, a lingering, subtle pulse – *una risonanza prolungata*.
The low frequency rumble continued, a prolonged vibration in my sternum – *una vibrazione lenta*.
A sustained, subtle hum resonated within my chest cavity – *una risonanza profonda*.
The prolonged vibration lingered in my jaw, a slow, pervasive feeling – *una vibrazione continua*.
A deep, resonating drone permeated my body, a lingering, subtle tremor – *una risonanza prolungata*.
The sustained rumble lingered in my legs, a slow, pervasive vibration – *una vibrazione lenta*.

A deep, resonating vibration lingered in my hip, a slow, pervasive tremor - *una vibrazione continua*.

A low hum lingered in my feet, creating a prolonged and subtle vibration – *una vibrazione lenta*.
The deep rumble resonated throughout my spine, a slow, pervasive feeling – *una risonanza profonda*.
A prolonged drone seemed to vibrate within my skull, a lingering, subtle tremor – *una vibrazione continua*.
The sustained vibration resonated in my hand, a slow, pervasive feeling – *una risonanza prolungata*.
A deep, drawn-out resonance filled my ears, a lingering, subtle pulse – *una vibrazione lenta*.

A low frequency rumble continued, a prolonged vibration in my shoulder - *una vibrazione continua*.
